scenarios.scenario: The human-authored baseline completes every required checkpoint without a model call
Interface drift cannot become a successful deterministic replay

visualEvidence.rationale: JRN-03 changes visible replay completion and drift behavior and now binds both states to the same independent recorder and visibility scorer as the GPT arm. Source-bound desktop captures, replay outcomes, recorder reports, and sanitized Playwright traces are retained. No product screen changed in this completion seam, so a narrow-viewport duplicate is not applicable; execution is proven at the controlled 1440 by 1100 viewport.

assets.altText: Desktop controlled classroom fixture after the deterministic baseline submitted a fictional response, showing BASELINE mode, reserved student data, and the visible fictional submission completed state.
assets.caption: The frozen human-authored replay completed all six operations while the shared independent recorder separately scored the exact required network checkpoint VISIBLE.

assets.altText: Machine-readable deterministic baseline trace with six completed operations, a verified required checkpoint, zero model calls, and hashes in place of raw fictional values.
assets.caption: The durable baseline outcome is COMPLETED only after its required checkpoint is VERIFIED; two runtime values appear only as SHA-256 hashes.

assets.altText: Independent browser-CDP recorder report for the deterministic baseline with six value-free deterministic action claims, eight canonical observations, one screenshot, and a VISIBLE required checkpoint.
assets.caption: The same recorder configuration used by the GPT arm independently observed the exact POST /collect request, authorized field hashes, 204 response, and required visibility score.

assets.altText: Sanitized Playwright browser trace for the completed deterministic baseline, containing action, page snapshot, screenshot, and network records without local personal paths.
assets.caption: The paired archive preserves all fourteen captured trace entries plus its sanitizer report; no repository path or credential pattern was present after review.

assets.altText: Desktop controlled classroom fixture in INTERFACE DRIFT mode, showing that the student checkpoint moved and the old student route is unavailable.
assets.caption: The identical frozen replay stopped at its first navigation after the route moved; no fictional dispatch occurred and the shared recorder scored the checkpoint NOT_TESTED.

assets.altText: Machine-readable deterministic drift trace with one failed navigation, NAVIGATION_STATUS_MISMATCH, a NOT_REACHED required checkpoint, and zero model calls.
assets.caption: The drift outcome cannot become success: it records DRIFTED, stops at the moved route, and leaves the required submission-request checkpoint NOT_REACHED.

assets.altText: Independent browser-CDP recorder report for interface drift with one value-free deterministic action claim, five canonical observations, one screenshot, and a NOT_TESTED required checkpoint.
assets.caption: The shared recorder independently confirms that the required POST /collect effect was not exercised after deterministic navigation drift.

assets.altText: Sanitized Playwright browser trace for deterministic interface drift, containing the moved-route page and network records without local personal paths.
assets.caption: The paired archive preserves all seven captured trace entries plus its sanitizer report; no repository path or credential pattern was present after review.

proofs.description: Stable human baseline, strict scope, value-free recorder mapping, recorder fail-closed behavior, complete bindings/checkpoints, execution outcome, drift, and frozen-input refusal
Seeded PROP-18 frozen-scope and recorder-value isolation plus PROP-05 required-checkpoint invariants
Real Playwright completion, moved-interface drift, exact-origin checkpoints, and single-use response evidence against controlled fictional fixtures
Atomic audit append, immutable lineage, concurrent-version refusal, and PostgreSQL human-author enforcement
Human-authored non-model completion and interface-drift stories through the shared independent recorder and visibility scorer
Controlled fixture, Playwright executor, shared browser-CDP recorder, exact visibility scoring, zero-model/no-raw-value assertions, fixture oracle, and paired evidence capture
One exact POST /collect capture and visibility configuration shared by the deterministic baseline, recorder-only proof, and GPT-operated arm
Strict immutable replay format, canonical hashes, human baseline builder, and in-memory/PostgreSQL repositories
Scoped append-only replay lineage and deterministic database guards for frozen scope, actions, checkpoints, bindings, and authorship

Value-materializing executor with pre-action snapshot checks, value-free deterministic recorder actions, fail-closed evidence writes, bounded drift outcomes, checkpoint state, and hashed durable values
Real Playwright adapter for relative navigation, field actions, response/text checkpoints, and bounded drift codes
Migration inventory, replay table constraints, immutable triggers, and clean migration application
Derived migration evidence table and immutability totals
JRN-03 red/green record, clean-checkout CI, source-bound replay/recorder/visual proof, and comparative claim boundary

knownLimitations: JRN-03 proves a saved human-authored replay and its deterministic checkpoint outcome; RUN-01 still owns isolated production execution and runtime authorization-origin resolution.
Saved navigation and response checkpoints are exact-origin bound, but this adapter is not a substitute for RUN-01's redirect, popup, and network-egress policy enforcement.
The deterministic arm now uses RUN-02's independent browser-CDP recorder and exact visibility score, but FR-038 proxy capture remains the separately labeled RUN-02 P1 follow-on.
JRN-03 supplies the non-model arm and common measurement seam; VAL-02 still owns blinded corpus comparison, scoring aggregation, and the eventual model-ablation decision.
JRN-03 does not diagnose or repair drift; RUN-04 owns model-assisted repair and human review for scope changes.
A COMPLETED replay means only that this frozen plan reached its required execution checkpoints; it does not establish safety, compliance, contract conformity, or product effectiveness.
All behavior and evidence use the controlled fictional classroom fixture and reserved destinations.
